Smaller 4 Star hotels offer a table rate that's almost half the price compared to other 4 Star hotels.
For example, for a Saturday banquet, the Grand Mercure along East Coast Road is about $888 per table, and Hotel Royal along Queen Street is even less at $598 per table!
A banquet at Amara for 40 tables would cost at least $43520.
A banquet at the Grand Mercure for 35 tables would cost about $31080.
You can go to for the full list of wedding table prices.
Share them with us.

HSN Community / Forums / HSN Arcade / Can you beat 22,375 on Mahjongg Dimensions?
Can you beat 22,375 on Mahjongg Dimensions?
This week's Game of the Week challenge for Friday Night Game Night is to beat my score of 22,375 points on Mahjongg Dimensions!
Anyone with scores equal or better than mine from Friday, October 7 to Thursday, October 13 at 11:59PM ET will be entered for a chance to win a $250 shopping spree!
Come back to this Community thread during Friday Night Game Night from 8PM - 11PM ET to see if you've won and to check out next week's Game of the Week!
Post your scores and comments below!
Congratulations to our 10/14/2016 winner!
Game of the Week: @Cathley won a $250 HSN Gift Card for beating Shannon Fox atMahjongg Dimensions!
I got 14,350 in Mahjongg Dimensions!
I don't think I have a chance to beat 22,375!
LOL!!!
okay this week i was lucky enough to hit 25350. what i want ot know is how do the other scores get sooooooo high....
Ok, I scored 22,450, which beats her score.
But I love playing these games, for almost 4 years now, but I have never won anything.
Just fun I guess to share!
All have a good night!

Many thanks 437!
I'll give that a try.
I went back to the lodge and cleaned the 300 BO real well thinking that might be a problem.
I've been shooting it quite a bit in last couple weeks and kinda lost track of cleaning.
Also, I filed down the rail on inside of .223 mag.
Saw on Utube that helps line them up better.
Thanks for the heads up and I'll give RNZ Unimag a try.
It looked like the ground shook when he fell.
Yea it may have just been gunked up.
Went out last night and got SKUNKED.....I mean total.
I did not see a deer, possum, raccoon, squirrel, armadillo....nada...obviously no yotes or hogs.
What a bizarre ghost town.
Thanks!
Need to get back out there and let some lead fly!
Just got a 6.8 SPC upper from Eric at Blackstone Arms and some 120 gr Cavity Back bullets.
Very nice boar!
Good going.
I like the way you marked the 300 mag.
I am going to do the same, don't want no problems!
I have an upper from Eric too.
I don't reload but would love to try those cavity backs.
He is working on adding the sale of loaded rounds in SPCII potency.
Keep your ear to the ground.

Sadly, news just arrived of Australian composer Phillip Houghton's (1954-2017) passing this last October 1, 2017 (see:
This, not even a year after the untimely death of Roland Dyens (1955-2016) on October 29, 2016.
Each composer contributed greatly to the guitar's repertoire and here is an excerpt of their discography.
2 p. 16), Roland was the highest (then) living composer in the TOP 100 with his Tango en skaï.
He was quite happy about this and asked me if he could tell, after reading the manuscript of GT 100 and accepting to endorse it.
